domains.rationale: The study is a phase 2 randomized controlled trial, giving it stronger design support than open pilot studies.
Primary endpoint, biomarker, and subgroup signals must remain separated to avoid over-interpreting exploratory findings.

limitations: Needs exact outcome-level extraction before certainty assessment.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

notes: Provisional agent triage; not a formal ROB2 or ROBINS-I domain-by-domain assessment.
